description_long: This is a large, double-sided advertising board mounted on a single cylindrical pole with a concrete base. The board features two wide, rectangular display panels arranged in a V-shape, each supported by a robust metal frame and bracing. A metal ladder runs vertically up the pole, providing access for maintenance. Along the lower edge of each display panel, a row of spotlights is mounted to illuminate the advertising surfaces. The back of the panels reveals a structural framework and a weathered, industrial finish. The overall construction is utilitarian, designed for high visibility and durability in outdoor urban environments.
description: A large, V-shaped double-sided advertising board on a pole with spotlights and a maintenance ladder, built for outdoor urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the main advertising panel, spotlights, and the central supporting pole with ladder.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the V-shaped arrangement of the two panels and the depth of the supporting structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open V-shape, structural framework, and the ladder running up the pole.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the V-shape and the arrangement of spotlights beneath the panels.
attribute_frame_design: thick metal frame with structural bracing and industrial finish
attribute_advertisement_content: blank white surface with no content
